drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T0()
then
    insert(new T1(4.0, 10, false));
end
query Q0(boolean $qa0_0, long $qa0_1)
    ( $qp0_0 : T1(f2 == $qa0_0, f1 < 12, $qb0_0 : f1) )
    or
    ( $qp0_1 : T1(f1 == $qa0_1, f0 <= -2.5, $qb0_1 : f2) and $qp0_2 : T1(f2 != true, f2 != false, $qb0_2 : f0, $qb0_3 : f0) )
end

query Q1(String $qa1_0, boolean $qa1_1)
    $qp1_0 : T0(f1 == $qa1_0)
    $qp1_1 : T1()
    $qp1_2 : T0(f0 == $qa1_1)
end

rule QR0 salience 5
when
    ?Q0(false, 0;)
then
end


rule QRtwin salience -3
when
    ?Q0(false, 0;)
then
end
name: qx9_min_neither
